canonical.title: Git decision from e8a7b2075e69
canonical.content:
Git decision from e8a7b2075e69

Source commit: e8a7b2075e69
Paths: .windsurf/rules/theme.md, src-tauri/src/cli.rs, src-tauri/src/main.rs, src-tauri/tmpclaude-7763-cwd, src-tauri/tmpclaude-7983-cwd, src/App.tsx, src/components/chat/DetachedChatWindow.tsx, src/components/git/GitPanel.tsx, src/components/layout/MainLayout.tsx, src/components/modals/OnboardingModal.tsx, src/hooks/useCliOpen.ts, src/index.css
Summary: refactor: complete theme system migration and enhance onboarding experience - Remove outdated theme rules documentation. - Integrate settings initialization in the App component to prevent UI flash during onboarding. - Update DetachedChatWindow and MainLayout components to use full height for better layout consistency.

canonical.title: Git decision from 3cb028c18b4a
canonical.content:
Git decision from 3cb028c18b4a

Source commit: 3cb028c18b4a
Paths: .gitignore, DOCS/plan/phase-2-3-contract.md, DOCS/plan/phase-3-4-5-contract.md, DOCS/plan/rust-agent-migration.md, message-reveal.md, package.json, scripts/tauri-dev-stable.mjs, src-tauri/Cargo.lock, src-tauri/Cargo.toml, src-tauri/src/agent_runtime/api_client.rs, src-tauri/src/agent_runtime/bridge.rs, src-tauri/src/agent_runtime/conversation.rs
Summary: refactor: migrate agent loop, tools, and persistence into Rust runtime Lifts the entire TypeScript agent hot path into Rust per the plan in DOCS/plan/. The TS layer becomes a thin facade that builds an AgentChatRequest and forwards events back to the existing UI callbacks. Backend (new modules): - agent_runtime/: Conve

canonical.title: Git lesson from 7fb1a38380b6
canonical.content:
Git lesson from 7fb1a38380b6

Source commit: 7fb1a38380b6
Paths: src/components/modals/ProvidersHubTab.tsx
Summary: fix(settings): don't nest IdeSwitch inside button in provider grid card `ProviderGridCard` rendered the whole tile as a `<button>` with the IdeSwitch nested inside — which is itself a button. HTML disallows nested buttons; React DOM warned `validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button>`.

op.evidence: commit 7fb1a38380b6 classified as lesson paths=src/components/modals/ProvidersHubTab.tsx message=fix(settings): don't nest IdeSwitch inside button in provider grid card `ProviderGridCard` rendered the whole tile as a `<button>` with the IdeSwitch nested inside — which is itself a button. HTML disallows nested buttons; React DOM warned `validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button>`.

Summary: fix(settings): don't nest IdeSwitch inside button in provider grid card `ProviderGridCard` rendered the whole tile as a `<button>` with the IdeSwitch nested inside — which is itself a button. HTML disallows nested buttons; React DOM warned `validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button>`.

HTML disallows nested buttons; React DOM warned `validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button>`.
